title: Soppana Sundari Lyrics Chennai 28 II Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Chennai 28 II Soppana Sundari Song Lyrics
Singer: Yuvan

hey othukolla venaam
idhu manamadha kalai
vitta vilagaathu
unakkenna kavalai

meesa endhirukkum munne
para papparapaa
aasa undhi undhi thala
unna mandhirippom
adi podi saravedi
idha vittu velaasu

dhinam thoonga mudiyaama
naan kandu vara
ippa porandha

enna kadha venum
sollitharavaa.
entha vazhi venum
alli tharavaa vaa

adiye pombalainga kaetta
naanga thattavilla
thaedi vandhatha ellaame
naanga vittathilla

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Soppana Sundari?

The song Soppana Sundari celebrates the charm and allure of a beautiful girl, filled with playful and light-hearted lyrics.

How does this song fit into the plot of Chennai 28 II?

In Chennai 28 II, the song reflects the carefree and joyous moments shared among friends, enhancing the film's youthful spirit.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by Yuvan, showcasing his unique style and musical prowess.

When was Soppana Sundari released?

Soppana Sundari was released on December 9, 2016, as part of the movie Chennai 28 II.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Soppana Sundari, the lively beats and catchy lyrics encapsulate the carefree essence of youth and friendship, making it a standout track in Chennai 28 II. The song conveys a sense of joy and celebration, inviting listeners to revel in the moments of happiness shared among friends. With Yuvan's energetic vocals, it evokes feelings of excitement and nostalgia, perfect for any festive occasion. This track not only enhances the film's narrative but also resonates with anyone looking to relive their youthful days.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Soppana Sundari from Chennai 28 II is a vibrant celebration of youth and joy, brought to life by the dynamic vocals of Yuvan. This upbeat track perfectly captures the essence of fun and camaraderie, making it a must-listen for any party playlist. Dive into the infectious energy of this song and let it elevate your spirits!
